caption: A screen recording captures a live stream featuring a web browser displaying a Statista chart titled "Percentage of COVID-19 cases in the United States from February 12 to March 16, 2020 resulting in death, by age group*". The browser is overlaid with a chat window on the left and a small webcam feed in the upper right showing a man with brown hair wearing a red shirt. Red banners containing URLs appear at the bottom of the screen, alternating between "Youtube.com/c/NormalAmericawithRobNoerr" and "Youtube.com/user/Destiny". As the sequence progresses, the chat scrolls with various usernames and messages, while the man in the webcam remains in a similar pose. The overall interface includes various UI elements typical of a streaming platform, with a dark theme and a background pattern of gray hexagonal tiles.
